positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a cosmic mountain range under a nebula-filled sky. The mountains are rendered with sharp, layered silhouettes in deep indigo and emerald green, contrasted against a central burst of bioluminescent stardust and gold nebulosity. Include stylized, geometric flora growing from the peaks and gentle, abstract constellations forming celestial rivers. The composition should be symmetrical and highly detailed, designed for a clean, high-contrast apparel print. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets Cosmic Psychedelia. Lighting: Dramatic contrast, emphasizing negative space and glow. Color Palette: Deep blues, purples, emerald green, and luminous gold accents. Composition: Central and balanced, allowing for comfortable placement on fabric.
negative: photorealistic, noisy, blur, watermark, signature, logo, text, jpeg artifacts, poor anatomy, extra limbs, dirty, cartoonish, graffiti, cluttered, low detail, gradient background, bokeh
